text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to win cutely and take center stage at
the winning concert...
choice_data_list: Maybe you were too focused on the concert?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to win cutely and take center stage at
the winning concert...
choice_data_list: Maybe you were too focused on the concert?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I've only just set out on the path to becoming a
top Umadol!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
As long as I don't stop, I'll keep on that path
forever and ever!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Yep! Expect great things from me, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'll definitely come in first next time... and take
center stage cute as can be! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I was so focused on winning just to take center
stage...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
It ended up affecting my running, and I lost...
Come on, Falco! You gotta get a grip!
choice_data_list:
Maybe we should work on your mental
fortitude.

Maybe we should work on your mental
fortitude.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Okay! Let's do it as soon as we get back!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna work harder than ever to become a top
Umadol!
